title: tiquiliopsis nuttallii
intro: Tiquiliopsis nuttallii, also known as the mountain holly or Tiquilia nuttallii, is a species of flowering plant in the borage family (Boraginaceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which have been attributed to its alkaloid and flavonoid content. The health benefits of Tiquiliopsis nuttallii include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and support the immune system. Tiquiliopsis nuttallii is often prepared as a tea or tincture for herbal use, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential applications.
